user.title: Samsung Frame TV
user.description: Enter the TV's IP address. Accept the 'Allow' prompt on the TV when it appears.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the TV. Check the IP and that it is powered on.
error.not_a_frame: This Samsung TV does not report Frame support.

abort.unique_id_mismatch: The device at this address is a different TV.

data_description.heartbeat_seconds: How often the TV is polled for power state. Push events arrive instantly regardless.

send_key.name: Send key
send_key.description: Sends a remote-control key to the TV (e.g. KEY_HOME, KEY_MENU, KEY_UP).

key.name: Key
key.description: The Samsung key code to send.

set_art_mode.name: Set art mode
set_art_mode.description: Switches the TV into or out of art mode (TV must be on).

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: True to show art, false to switch to watching.

select_art.name: Select art
select_art.description: Selects an artwork on the TV by its content id (see the current art sensor).

content_id.name: Content ID
content_id.description: The TV-side id of the artwork, e.g. MY_F0034.

upload_art.name: Upload art
upload_art.description: Uploads an image file to the TV's art collection (path must be inside allowlist_external_dirs).

matte.name: Matte
matte.description: Matte style id, e.g. shadowbox_polar; 'none' for no matte.

delete_art.name: Delete art
delete_art.description: Deletes an artwork from the TV by content id. Cannot be undone.

content_id.name: Content ID
content_id.description: The TV-side id of the artwork to delete.

duration_minutes.name: Duration
duration_minutes.description: Minutes per artwork; 0 disables the slideshow.

category_id.name: Category
category_id.description: MY-C0002 = my pictures, MY-C0004 = favourites, MY-C0008 = store.

change_matte.name: Change matte
change_matte.description: Changes the matte (frame style) of an artwork; defaults to the current one.

matte_id.name: Matte
matte_id.description: Matte style id, e.g. shadowbox_polar, modern_apricot, none.

content_id.name: Content ID
content_id.description: Artwork to change; defaults to the currently displayed one.

set_photo_filter.name: Set photo filter
set_photo_filter.description: Applies a photo filter to an artwork; defaults to the current one.

filter_id.name: Filter
filter_id.description: Filter id, e.g. ink, aqua, none.

content_id.name: Content ID
content_id.description: Artwork to change; defaults to the currently displayed one.

set_favourite.name: Set favourite
set_favourite.description: Marks or unmarks an artwork as favourite; defaults to the current one.

favourite.name: Favourite
favourite.description: True to favourite, false to unfavourite.

content_id.name: Content ID
content_id.description: Artwork to change; defaults to the currently displayed one.
